name: xuzhijie-ownself-long-running-harness
description: Multi-agent sprint orchestration harness implementing Anthropic's long-running agent patterns — 6 agents, GAN-like generator/evaluator loop, domain-agnostic profiles, quantified QA

metadata.description: Multi-agent sprint orchestration harness for long-running application development

plugins.name: long-running-harness
plugins.description: Anthropic-style long-running harness with 6 agents (initializer, planner, generator, evaluator, coordinator, releaser), GAN-like adversarial evaluation, domain profiles (software, architecture, tender, research, content, business analysis), sprint contracts, quantified 0-5 grading, and auto-commit protocol
